title: Wanderer: Pets
description: Ports the "Wandering" function from LO: Pets to vanilla tamable animals.
body:
###

Wanderer **Wanderer** allows you to set your tamed pets to "Wandering Mode". In _Wandering Mode_, your pets will simply wander around as if they were wild. This is a direct port of the same Wandering Mode from Livestock Overhaul: Pets Addon, just made for any tamable animal. To set your pet to Wandering, **Shift-Right-Click it while it's standing up**. - Note that if a modded animal does not extend the TamableAnimal class, this mod will not work for it.

[![Partner](https://i.imgur.com/oxzCr5w.png)](https://billing.kinetichosting.net/aff.php?aff=1122)
